title: Audit Task: Data Classification Sweep
description: The compliance team is verifying adherence to the internal Data Classification Policy. Review the classification standards and then cross-reference them with the current data warehouse inventory. Identify any datasets that are improperly classified or mislabeled.
justification: DB_PROD_CUSTOMERS contains restricted credit card data but is improperly classified as 'Internal'. DB_METRICS_AGG contains generic anonymous metrics but is improperly over-classified as 'Confidential'.

files.name: Data_Classification_Policy_v1.md
solutionTexts: Any dataset containing mixed classifications must be labeled at the **highest** level of sensitivity present in the dataset.
